title: Simple Cannonballs
description: Cannonballs, which can be crafted and shot from dispensers.
body:

### The cannons from this mod have been improved and added to [Valkyrien Pirates](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-pirates)

Craft cannonballs with 8 iron nuggets and 1 gunpowder. Put them in a dispenser to shoot. That's it.


Feel free to use in modpacks so long as you link back to this page.


Requires Fabric API
